violations.description: SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Observed single use cups and lids being stored on the floor in the lower level storage area.

SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): The temperature of the rinse cycle of the heat sanitizing dish machine noted not adequate to achieve final sanitization. Suggest sanitizing clean utensils and dishes in sanitizer basin of 3 compartment sink until dishwashing machine is properly sanitizing at 160?F or above.
